# Size

**Data field**

A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the size in bytes of the atom structure.

## Data fields

- **Type**: A 32-bit unsigned integer value.
- **Buffer size**: A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the suggested size of the associated data buffer.
- **Max bit rate**: A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the maximum bit rate in bits/second of the associated media stream.
- **Average bit rate**: A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the average bit rate in bits/second of the associated media stream.
